codex_response:
Implemented `task_59341089`. The rule is: mirror each input row left-to-right, concatenate that mirrored row with the original row, then repeat the 6-cell strip once more. The summary hint was used; it matched all official examples, so no `notes.md` was needed. No new primitive was added.

Validation passed end to end: `5/5` official examples matched, the builder produced `1000` examples, `1000/1000` generated examples re-verified, and `preview_01.png` looked on-family against the originals sheet.
